title: Insolvency practitioner sanctions: Julie Ann Swan 30 April 2025
body: "Between 5 July 2021 and 5 October 2021 Mrs Julie Ann Swan as Joint Liquidator of “X” Limited failed to act in accordance with the Fundamental Principle of Professional Competence and Due Care as set out at R2103.1 in the Insolvency Code of Ethics (applicable from 1 May 2020) by failing to take account of information provided to her in an email dated 3 June 2021, when calculating and making a first cash distribution to the Company’s shareholders. "
